Recto After Jacopo Negretti, called Palma il Giovane

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Virgin and Child with Saints Thomas and John the Baptist (recto); Sleeping Venus (verso)
by Recto After Jacopo Negretti, called Palma il Giovane
Italy · 1600–1699 · Pen and brown ink
←Luca Giordano Bartolomeo di Giovanni→
